description: Create a two-file Talon module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\claim_launcher\ consisting of claim_launcher.py and claim_launcher.talon. The module must dynamically monitor C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Processed_Claims for .pdf and .csv files using fs.watch and maintain a dynamic Talon list named user.claims. Spoken forms in the list should be derived from filenames by removing extensions, replacing underscores and hyphens with spaces, and converting to lowercase. Include a voice command 'open claim <user.claims>' that opens the target file using os.startfile(). The system must update the list automatically when directory contents change without hardcoding the file list.
